allow: PowerShell("=== src ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\BMHeroRecomp\\src | Select-Object FullName; "=== patches ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\BMHeroRecomp\\patches | Select-Object FullName; "=== include ==="; Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\BMHeroRecomp\\include | Select-Object FullName; "=== BMHeroSyms ==="; Get-ChildItem C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\BMHeroRecomp\\BMHeroSyms | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell("=== WCW SHA1 ==="; \(Get-FileHash "C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\roms\\WCW vs. nWo - World Tour \(USA\).z64" -Algorithm SHA1\).Hash; "=== WCW MD5 ==="; \(Get-FileHash "C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\roms\\WCW vs. nWo - World Tour \(USA\).z64" -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; "=== first bytes \(header\) ==="; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\roms\\WCW vs. nWo - World Tour \(USA\).z64"\)[0..63]; \($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join ' ')

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\roms\\WCW vs. nWo - World Tour \(USA\)\\WCW vs. nWo - World Tour \(USA\).z64"; "=== SHA1 ==="; \(Get-FileHash $p -Algorithm SHA1\).Hash; "=== MD5 ==="; \(Get-FileHash $p -Algorithm MD5\).Hash; "=== header bytes ==="; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($p\)[0..63]; \($bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join ' ')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\N64Recomp\\src | Select-Object Name; "=== include ==="; Get-ChildItem C:\\Users\\selki\\depot\\N64Recomp\\include -Recurse -File | Select-Object Name)
